data.name: Strait of Hormuz
data.notes: Iran can close with mines and missiles. 30% global oil trade. US 5th Fleet primary response.

data.name: Strait of Malacca
data.notes: 80% China oil imports. China seeks BRI alternatives: CPEC and Kra Canal.

data.name: Suez Canal
data.notes: Houthi attacks diverting traffic via Cape. 30-40% reduction 2024.

data.name: Panama Canal
data.notes: Drought-reduced capacity 2023-24. Chinese port investments both ends concern US.

data.name: Bab-el-Mandeb
data.notes: Houthi attacks ongoing 2024. Most commercial shipping rerouting.

data.name: Taiwan Strait
data.notes: China blockade would disrupt global semiconductor supply. TSMC critical vulnerability.

data.name: Turkish Straits Bosporus
data.notes: Turkey controls access. Russia Black Sea Fleet restricted under Montreux post-2022.

data.name: Lombok Strait
data.notes: PLAN submarine operations southbound to Indian Ocean.
